steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: A government body officially known as the Althing, is an introductory appositive phrase. The text after the comma must supply a subject that names that same entity and a predicate that completes the sentence.

steps.title: Apply the grammatical rule for appositives
steps.content:
The correct choice places Iceland's parliament immediately after the introductory appositive, making it the subject, followed by the predicate is one of the oldest in the world. Choices B, C, and D create dangling modifier errors.

That confirms A is correct.
